name: Creole Skillet
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion, pepper, and celery to the skillet. Sauté until onions are translucent and peppers and celery are tender crisp.
3. Stir in flour and cook for 1-2 minutes to remove any raw flour taste.
4. Mix in seasoning salt according to your recipe.
5. Add tuna and corn. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
7. Serve with rice and grated Parmesan/Romano cheese on top.
Note: Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning for the best results.
